//: FOUNDRY project (contracts/foundry.toml) — not Hardhat. Our ~20 .sol files live in contracts/{src,test,script}; the 1,726 files under contracts/lib/ are vendored submodule deps. Use ONE Foundry-native LSP (Wake / ackeeblockchain.tools-for-solidity) and DISABLE 'nomicfoundation.hardhat-solidity' for this workspace (Extensions panel → Disable (Workspace)). The wake.* values below mirror the repo-root wake.toml and are verified clean via the `wake` CLI; keep the two in sync.
//compiler: Mirror contracts/foundry.toml so Wake compiles identically to `forge build`.
//remappings: Full set from `forge remappings` (incl. nested deps Foundry auto-resolves but Wake does not), targets prefixed with contracts/ since the editor runs Wake from the repo root. The short list alone leaves v4-core's solmate/openzeppelin imports unresolved.
//paths: Vendored deps stay importable (allow_paths) but are not compiled as standalone project sources (exclude_paths). test/ and script/ are NOT excluded here — they must compile so library usage is visible (else DeltaMath shows as 'unused').
//detectors: Run Wake's static analysis on src/ only. Exclude the vendored tree AND test/script from REPORTING (they stay compiled) — that helper-code noise was the leftover errors.
//editor: Keep the explorer, search, and file watcher out of the vendored + build trees.
